subcategory: Animated infinite grid background with mouse-following spotlight
use_cases: Hero section backgrounds for landing pages
Interactive wallpaper for SaaS product pages
Visual interest layer for dark-themed interfaces
Product showcase backdrops with cursor interaction
ai_summary: An animated infinite grid background component featuring a mouse-following radial gradient spotlight that reveals the grid pattern. The grid continuously scrolls diagonally while ambient gradient orbs add depth. Uses Framer Motion's useAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps animation and supports dark mode with a sleek, minimal aesthetic ideal for hero sections and landing pages.
